name: First Quantum Minerals Ltd.
description: First Quantum Minerals Ltd. is a global copper company focused on the production of copper, gold, and nickel. The company operates mines in several countries, including Zambia, Panama, Finland, Turkey, Spain, and Australia. First Quantum is committed to responsible mining practices, environmental stewardship, and contributing positively to the communities where it operates, while striving to deliver long-term value to its shareholders.
